caption: A man with a beard is seen from the chest up, seated in a studio setting. He is wearing a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" and a small circular logo on the chest, a black baseball cap with an embroidered design, and over-ear headphones. A gold chain hangs around his neck. He sits before a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a white wall featuring a repeating logo that reads "GRINDED HUSTLE" accompanied by stars, and a backdrop with the text "BOSS TALK 101". Two graphic overlays appear on screen: one on the left reading "PODCAST" beneath a logo, and another on the right that says "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while looking off-camera to his right.
